wins: Strong noninterest income growth due to market conditions and business investments
Successful share repurchase program with $6.1 billion in stock buybacks
Positive credit trends with stable charge-offs and consistent consumer spend
Investments in talent and technology for Corporate & Investment Banking
Early signs of share and fee growth contributing to revenue diversification
risks: Higher deposit costs and interest rate volatility impacting net interest income
